articles.title: Higher For Longer, That’s The Story Of Oil And Gas Prices
articles.description: Higher oil and gas prices are going to stay with us for quite a while as inventory levels reach historic lows.

articles.title: Trump's Ceasefire Gamble: Navigating Tensions with Iran
articles.description: President Donald Trump is considering a proposed deal to extend the ceasefire with Iran, though significant differences remain between the two countries. Trump demands dismantling Iran's nuclear capability and open access to the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices dropped on news of the potential agreement affecting global markets.

articles.title: US-Iran Peace Hopes Weigh on Crude Oil Prices
articles.description: July WTI crude oil (CLN26 ) on Friday closed down -1.54 (-1.73%), and July RBOB gasoline (RBN26 ) closed down -0.0665 (-2.14%). Crude oil and gasoline prices retreated on Friday, with crude oil falling to a 5-week low. Crude prices are under pressu...

articles.title: Forecasts for Above-Average US Temps Boost Nat-Gas Prices
articles.description: July Nymex natural gas (NGN26 ) on Friday closed up +0.005 (+0.15%). Nat-gas prices climbed to a 2.5-month nearest-futures high on Friday and settled slightly higher on the outlook for above-normal US temperatures next month, potentially boosting nat...

articles.title: Gas Prices Are Falling But Still Far Above Pre-War Levels: Here's What's Keeping Them High
articles.description: While a possible U.S.-Iran ceasefire deal has helped push gas prices lower, tight fuel supplies, summer demand, and ongoing uncertainty in global oil markets mean drivers should not expect significant relief at the pump immediately. , US News, Times Now

articles.title: Iran war wiped out 1.5 billion barrels of oil - so far
articles.description: Rory Johnston, founder of Commodity Context, discusses the damage inflicted on oil prices from the Iran war. Watch the video.

articles.title: Govt Ensures Petrol, Diesel, LPG Supply With 30-Day Reserves Plan; 6500 LPG Raids, 15 Arrests As Sales Spike 100% In 14 Districts
articles.description: The Petroleum Ministry claimed India has ample fuel with refineries at optimum and 30-day LPG reserves planned, as 6500 LPG raids net arrests amid abnormal sales spikes and ₹10 per litre excise cut costs ₹14,000 Crore per month.

articles.title: Walmart cuts electric bike price by 70% for summer
articles.description: Walmart just slashed this electric mountain bike to $330 from $1,100 and it's perfect for beating summer gas prices.

articles.title: Optimism about peace pact lifts equities
articles.description: RECAP: Asian stock markets rose and oil prices receded yesterday, boosted by optimism that the United States and Iran will reach a deal to end their war that has hobbled global energy supplies.

articles.title: Canada gas prices fall on Iran optimism, but will relief last?
articles.description: Experts say it’s anyone’s guess whether the relief Canadians have been feeling at the pumps over the past week will last into June.
